title: Pale World
description: It's the Creaking's world, we just live in it.
body:
![A image with the words "Pale World" written in a Minecraft font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db6670d2d965107573052742c40740a1b1b84c41.png)
It's the Creaking's world, we just live in it
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### Features
Current Features * Biome Generation Tweaks * New trees * New flowers * New blocks * VFX * Blocks & Items * Pale Vines * Pale Berries * Pale Apple * Dying Dripleaf (Big & Small) * Dying Azelea * Drained Amathyst * Pale Biome Variants * Pale Caves * Mobs * Pale Axolotl * Vampire Bat * Advancements
---------------------------------------------------------------- ### FAQ * I just want the visuals from the Pale Garden, can I have just them? * Absolutely! Check out [Pale Garden Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/palegardenfx)! * Forge/Neoforge? * Forge: No. * NeoForge: 82.85% (You can view the todo [here](https://miro.com/app/board/uXjVJFu8FWw=/?share_link_id=153758793046)) * Can I use this in a mod pack * Yes!
